text.value:
-- SQL Query for Log_Batch_Start

INSERT INTO OUT.AP_LeadConduit_Batch_Log (WindowStart, WindowEnd, After_ID, RecordsFetched, Status, RunDateTime)
VALUES (
    '@{pipeline().parameters.p_WindowStart}', 
    '@{pipeline().parameters.p_WindowEnd}', 
    '@{pipeline().parameters.p_LastAfterID}',
    0, 
    'RUNNING',
    '@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ')}' -- **SUPPLYING THE CURRENT TIME**
);

-- MAX(ID) Retrieval remains the same:
SELECT TOP 1 ID AS LogID 
FROM OUT.AP_LeadConduit_Batch_Log
WHERE
    WindowStart = '@{pipeline().parameters.p_WindowStart}' 
    AND WindowEnd = '@{pipeline().parameters.p_WindowEnd}'
    AND Status = 'RUNNING'
ORDER BY 
    ID DESC;
